hooks.name: notify-ask
hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .gemini/hooks/notify-user.ps1 -Message 'I have a question for you!'

hooks.name: notify-turn-end
hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .gemini/hooks/notify-user.ps1 -Message 'Turn finished. Waiting for your prompt.'

hooks.name: notify-permission
hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .gemini/hooks/notify-user.ps1 -Message 'Action required: Tool permission needed.'
